auto_bands_method: per-band VHT2 variance → log-weight allocation clipped to [3,5], rebalanced to sum=35
note: sp_auto_bands.py computed factors from a 2048-vector K-dump (SHANNON_PRIME_DUMP_K) on hd=128. Post-fix Qwen3 K dump had near-flat band energies so a pure min/max proportional split degenerates to 3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3,3 at total=30; bumping total to 35 produced this front-loaded 4,4,4,4,4,3,3,3,3,3 allocation.
